criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as personalized recommendations, chatbots, or visual search.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on major app stores, indicating overall user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store ratings.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded, reflecting its popularity.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store statistics.

criteria.name: Feature Richness
criteria.description: The variety and usefulness of features offered by the app, such as payment options, delivery tracking, and customer support.

criteria.name: User Interface Design
criteria.description: The quality and intuitiveness of the app's user interface, affecting ease of use.
